title: Improving Lead Quality and Conversion Efficiency
subtitle: Using real-time ingestion, AI-led scoring, and personalized journeys to help teams focus on higher-intent prospects.
overview: A leading life insurance provider worked with Attributics to improve lead management and conversion by reducing duplication, prioritizing high-intent prospects, and building a more effective CRM and engagement model.

challenge.description: Leads entered the system from multiple online and offline sources, making it difficult to identify intent and prioritize follow-up. Duplicate records also reduced agent efficiency and weakened conversion performance.

solution.description: A real-time ingestion framework was established across digital and offline touchpoints, supported by AI-driven lead scoring and cross-channel journeys across SMS, email, and in-app. Personalized offers and optimized landing experiences were also introduced to improve lead handling and conversion outcomes.

process.description: Lead data from multiple sources was centralized, scoring logic was applied to prioritize prospects, and personalized journeys were activated to improve engagement and reduce wasted effort.

techStack: AI-driven lead scoring, CRM workflows, SMS, email, in-app engagement.
conclusion: The solution helped turn fragmented lead intake into a more intelligent and conversion-oriented engagement engine, improving both operational efficiency and revenue outcomes.
